meta.title: Can Argentina Survive Cristina? When Sovereigns Violate the
meta.description: President Kirchner’s actions could hold grave consequences for Argentina and the rule of law. What happens when a democratically elected leader of a G-20 nation arguably defies national law, U.S. courts, and international treaties by refusing to pay her country’s bills? On September 23rd, Hudson Institute will host two expert panels to analyze the implications of this second default and discuss whether Argentina can survive such policy decisions. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.
